items.title: NePoLaBo 10-Second Video Contest Results
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

We are pleased to announce the results of the 10-second video contest for the virtual concert “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live.” Thank you for the many great submissions! All of the entries that conveyed the love for NePoLaBo and the passion of the performance moved the entire staff.

After a careful review, the winning entries that shone especially brightly have been selected and are presented here. Winners will receive a commemorative in-app gift: “NePoLaBo Live Celebration T All Members Ver. (Signed).”

We will contact the winners via X direct message.

Momosuzu Nene Winning Clip

Omaru Polka Winning Clips

レギルスちゅーる(中尉)【雪民】さん An overwhelming display of star power—you can feel the aura from any angle!

The idea to film it behind was brilliant!

See the post here.

Yukihana Lamy Winning Clips

Shishiro Botan Winning Clips

レギルスちゅーる(中尉)【雪民】さん

Holoearth Tourism Agency Special Mentions

らぴす〖雪民〗さん X ID: @lapis5303

The very “Urya-oi!” that became an in-app gesture!

The fact that it captures not just Nene but also Lamy’s dancing really scores points!See the post here.

X ID: This adorable moment between Nene and Botan is captured perfectly!

It is an emotional scene that makes you want to see even more of their close moments.

See the post here.

items.title: Ver. 1.2.1.1 Release Notes
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
This is the Holoearth Management Team.

Holoearth was updated on January 19, 2026.

■

items.title: Tokino Sora New Year’s Party 2026 “Dreams in Motion” Support Campaign in Holoearth Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

Starting Thursday, January 8, 2026, we are holding a support campaign for Tokino Sora New Year’s Party 2026 “Dreams in Motion” in Holoearth! During the campaign period, a street takeover featuring the concert’s key visual will be held, and items such as a new T-shirt will also be available for purchase in Holoearth.

Be sure to come by and show your support!

(Schedule is subject to change.)

Anyone can join in the festivities for free by downloading and installing Holoearth.

(Note: Holoearth is available only for Windows.)

The support campaign includes a street takeover featuring the concert’s key visual & the illustration for “Pulse” in Alternative City.

“Dreams in Motion” Commemorative Items

New items were added to the “hololive production official shop in HOLOEARTH”. A T-shirt featuring the concert key visual will be included, as well as the return of the popular Tokino Sora “Sync Hoodie” and “Sync Cap”!

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・Tokino Sora “Dreams in Motion” T

・Tokino Sora Sync Hoodie (Blk / Pk)

・Tokino Sora Sync Cap (Blk / Pk)

In addition, pathfinder items inspired by Tokino Sora are also for sale!

January 8, 2026 (Thu) after maintenance.

・Pathfinder Jacket Tokino Sora

・Pathfinder Sneakers Tokino Sora

items.title: “NePoLaBo Live Preview Area” Special Opening & 10-Second Video Contest Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

In addition, we are accepting entries for the “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live 10-Second Video Contest”! We look forward to seeing short videos of your favorite NePoLaBo Live scenes from the full performance!

“NePoLaBo Live Preview Area” Free Entry Area Now Open!

This area is a free-to-enter experience area. Even those experiencing Holoearth for the first time can participate using a PC (Windows).

Come meet NePoLaBo in Holoearth!

Anyone can join in the festivities for free by downloading and installing Holoearth.

(Note: Holoearth is available only for Windows.)

10-Second Video Contest Start!

hololive 5th Generation “NePoLaBo” (Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan)

Selected outstanding entries will be specially featured on the official website, and winners will also receive a commemorative digital in-app prize: The “NePoLaBo Live Celebration T All Members Ver. (Signed)”

(Schedule is subject to change.)

From the Options menu, please toggle OFF “NaviRobo” and “User names”. Record the video at a resolution of 1920×1080 pixels (Full HD) or higher. The submission must be a video 10 seconds or less, with in-concert audio, clipped from the full performance of “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live.” Post the video on X with the following hashtag (submit as many times as you like): #NePoLaBoHoloearthLive

Edits and combining multiple scenes together will not be accepted.

Only a single scene may be used (no editing).

Using videos or materials external to this performance will not be accepted.

Please use the original audio from the selected scene as-is.

Audio editing, processing, or adding other audio sources is prohibited.

items.title: Yamato Phantasia Watch Party in Holoearth Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

From January 1 until January 13, 2026, footage of “Yamato Phantasia,” which was held in Holoearth two summers ago, will be shown on the large theater screen in Kyo-no-Miyako. This New Year, come relive that excitement once again in Holoearth.

(Schedule is subject to change.)

Anyone can join in the festivities for free by downloading and installing Holoearth.

(Note: Holoearth is available only for Windows.)

items.title: 2026 New Year’s Greetings: Holoearth Management Letter
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Happy New Year everyone! This is the Holoearth project lead, Ikko Fukuda.

I would like to express my sincere gratitude to everyone for their continued support of Holoearth.

Thanks to your warm encouragement, Holoearth was able to officially launch as Version 1.0.0 on April 24, 2025.

With the goal of providing an experience where talents from hololive production and users can meet in the same space, and of further expanding the opportunities for talents to shine, we have continued development and regular updates.

This event was not a conventional streamed digital performance, but rather it was designed as a new experience where you actually enter the world where the talents are and actually see them at the venue.

We have previously taken on virtual event challenges, such as the “Protolive” in December 2022 and “Protolive #2: ~Yamato Phantasia~” in July 2023. With this latest performance, however, we were able to achieve a significant evolution across every aspect of the experience, bringing greater immersion with the talent models, enhanced graphics, full virtual immersion, and an overall leap forward in quality.

Unlike traditional streamed performances, this event offered: ・The ability to meet the talents in the same space.

・Deep immersion, allowing viewing from any angle at close range in 360 degrees.

・A spatial performance that would be impossible to realize at a real-world concert.

・The ability to participate again through a “3D archive” that preserves the entire event space.

We believe we were able to deliver a completely new form of concert experience—one that represents the unique value only Holoearth can provide.

Currently, “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” is available to re-experience as a 3D archive until Wednesday, January 21 at 23:59 (JST). Whether you have yet to experience it or have already participated, we hope you enjoy discovering something new that is uniquely your own. No VR equipment is necessary, only a Windows PC.

In addition, for those who do not have a system to join via Holoearth, we are also offering the conventional archived streaming options via the SPWN and ZAIKO platforms. Be sure to check out the powerful visuals made possible by the meticulously crafted camera work from our operations staff—an appeal unique to the streamed version.

“NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” special website.

As the first piece of news for 2026, we are pleased to announce that the avatars of all talents belonging to hololive production have been implemented in Holoearth. With this, whenever the talents log into Holoearth, they can visit this world at any time in their own true form.

Not only during concerts and events—there may also be moments when a talent casually drops by just to hang out.

This implementation goes beyond simply adding avatars. It signifies that the most important foundation has been put in place to expand each talent’s new basis for activities.

Toward concerts, events, and entirely new kinds of encounters—please look forward to the future developments of Holoearth that begin from here.

In 2026, we will further enhance the concert and event experiences where users can meet talents in Holoearth, and we will also work on expanding the “play environment” so that even more people can participate.

We are currently preparing a cloud gaming system that allows those without a PC or those using a Mac to easily join events through a web browser. In addition to this, we are also progressing with the development of a version for mobile platforms.

In 2026, we will continue to create and deliver experiences that are unique to meeting talents—experiences that are different from YouTube streams or real-world events—together with everyone.

We look forward to your continued support of Holoearth in 2026.
